description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a combination of white and pastel pink walls, large rectangular windows, and a recessed entryway with a garage to the left. A small landscaped front yard with a tree and greenery adds curb appeal, while a balcony with a round table and umbrella overlooks the garden. The rear of the house has a private patio area and a large wooden sliding door, with additional windows providing natural light. The overall structure is compact, with a focus on functional outdoor spaces and minimalistic architectural details.
description: A modern two-story house with flat roofs, pastel pink and white walls, large windows, a garage, balcony, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, balcony with umbrella, and landscaped yard with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, minimal windows, and the extension of the garden area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large wooden sliding door, private patio, and upper-level balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible garden beds, side windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a flat overhang, modern door, adjacent garage, and landscaped steps
